summary_en: Media Co. tender offer for Oricon at ¥1,332/share. Target to acquire 8,211,375 shares (minimum threshold 3,903,300 shares). Offer period May 29 – Jul 9, 2026; settlement Jul 16, 2026. SMBC Nikko Securities as tender agent.
title_en: Notice of Commencement of Tender Offer for Oricon Inc. (TSE Code: 4800) by Media Co.
translation_en_brief: Media Co. announced the commencement of a tender offer for Oricon Inc., a company listed on the TSE Standard Market (Code 4800). The offer price is ¥1,332 per ordinary share. Media Co. plans to acquire 8,211,375 shares, with a minimum threshold of 3,903,300 shares and no stated upper limit. The tender offer runs from May 29, 2026 to July 9, 2026 (30 business days), with settlement commencing July 16, 2026. SMBC Nikko Securities serves as the tender agent. Media Co. was established on March 17, 2026 solely to acquire and own Oricon shares. Its parent, Technology Co., is wholly owned by the Marunouchi Capital No. 3 Investment Limited Liability Partnership, managed by Marunouchi Capital Co. as the unlimited liability partner.
